nasb.text: But those vine-growers said to one another, ‘This is the heir; come, let us kill him, and the inheritance will be ours!’

esv.text: But those tenants said to one another, ‘This is the heir. Come, let us kill him, and the inheritance will be ours.’

cnv.text: 那些佃戶卻彼此說：‘這是繼承產業的；來，我們殺了他，產業就是我們的了。’

ccb.text: 这班佃户却彼此商量说，‘这个就是园主的继承人。来吧！我们杀掉他，产业就归我们了。’

csbs.text: “可是那些农夫彼此说：‘这是继承人。来，我们把他杀了，那继业就归我们了。’
